hero.title: Merchant's Province
hero.subtitle: Create cities, districts, and economies that evolve along with your players
hero.phrase: The pen is weightier than the sword when the ledger is filled with the gold of nations.

livingEconomy.title: A World That Trades, Remembers, and Evolves
livingEconomy.description: Build cities, shape economies, and watch your campaign evolve through every trade, alliance, and transaction made by your players

characterSheets.title: Living Character Sheets
characterSheets.description: Inventories, wealth, equipment, and relationships remain synchronized across every shop, district, and session

merchantCities.title: Intelligent Merchants and Guilds
merchantCities.description: Populate your world with merchants, guilds, black markets, and artisan districts that shape the identity of every settlement

tradeSystems.title: Markets That Never Sleep
tradeSystems.description: Prices, stock levels, rare goods, and merchant behavior react to scarcity, regional events, faction influence, and player reputation

interactiveWorldbuilding.title: Interactive Cartography
interactiveWorldbuilding.description: Design districts, marketplaces, and connected settlements through interactive city and province management systems

narrativeTools.title: Narrative Infrastructure
narrativeTools.description: Manage contracts, decrees, rumors, and political influence through systems designed to support emergent storytelling

provinceDistricts.title: The Living Province
provinceDistricts.description: A world where every trade route is a vein and every district a vital organ.

demo.phrase: Step into a living province and experience how cities, merchants, and characters evolve in response to player decisions.

quote.phrase: Kingdoms are not built by kings, but by the stories, agreements, and ambitions of their people.

newsCarousel.harvest: BOUNTIFUL HARVEST: FOOD -25%, ALE PRICES STABLE
newsCarousel.decree: IMPERIAL DECREE: SILVER TAX +2% FOR GUILD ALLIES
newsCarousel.plague: RUMORS OF A PLAGUE IN THE EASTERN HERB FIELDS: POTIONS ON THE RISE

hero.title: Every coin leaves its mark on the world
hero.subtitle: A dynamic economy where your transactions echo across districts, guilds, and the balance of the province.

flow.title: The Flow of Power
flow.subtitle: Every transaction sets off a chain of consequences throughout the empire.
flow.description: When you purchase a sword in the Harbor District, the Blacksmiths' Guild gains leverage against the Admiralty. Steel prices rise in the Artisans' Quarter, and the city increases guard patrols around the forge. Your gold is more than currency; it is a vote for the kind of world you wish to inhabit.

underConstruction.title: The Market Is Being Recounted
underConstruction.subtitle: The Guild's auditors are verifying inventories, contracts and trade routes.
underConstruction.description: Trade records from across the province are still being consolidated. Prices, reports and merchant activity will become available once the recount is complete.
underConstruction.returnWhen: Return when the Merchant Guild authorizes public access to the records.

underConstruction.title: The Chroniclers Are Still Writing
underConstruction.subtitle: The Royal Archive has not yet received the latest accounts from across the province
underConstruction.description: Our scribes are gathering reports, rumors, decrees, and testimonies from distant districts. The next chapter of the province's history is still being compiled.
underConstruction.returnWhen: Return once the Guild of Chroniclers has completed its records.
